case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JOSE YONI NOEL TUN KU

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-11-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JOSE TUN KU IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF ADDRESS UPDATE IN RE: DEFENDANT FILED BY DEFENDANT KU, JOSE YONI NOEL TUN
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KU, JOSE YONI NOEL TUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED FEB-15-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KU, JOSE YONI NOEL TUN
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-11-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-11-2018 BY PRO TEM JOHNATHAN POLLAND. 506 PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JONATHAN POLLAND; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KU, JOSE YONI NOEL TUN $1,920.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,025.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
